Modem Control

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x10
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Controls modem handshaking signals and loopback/IrDA mode.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:7] reserved rw 0x0 -
[6] sire rw 0x0 SIRE
[5] afce rw 0x0 AFCE
[4] lb rw 0x0 LB
[3] out2 rw 0x0 OUT2
[2] out1 rw 0x0 OUT1
[1] rts rw 0x0 RTS
[0] dtr rw 0x0 DTR

Field Descriptions

sire - SIRE

SIR Mode Enable. 0=IrDA disabled, 1=IrDA SIR mode enabled (when SIR_MODE configured).

afce - AFCE

Auto Flow Control Enable. 0=disabled, 1=enabled (when AFCE_MODE configured).

lb - LB

Loopback Bit. Enables diagnostic loopback mode; modem control inputs are disconnected.

out2 - OUT2

User-designated Output2. Value is inverted on out2_n pin. 0=de-asserted, 1=asserted.

out1 - OUT1

User-designated Output1. Value is inverted on out1_n pin. 0=de-asserted, 1=asserted.

rts - RTS

Request to Send. Controls rts_n output. 0=de-asserted, 1=asserted.

dtr - DTR

Data Terminal Ready. Value is inverted on dtr_n pin. 0=de-asserted, 1=asserted.
